creator: byronkatz@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Raphael Kubo da Costa from comment #8)
I think you are referring to the "inner" makefile that is used by cmake, *not* the port makefile.  I'm not clear on how to pass thru this flag to the inner make.  Furthermore, I'm not sure any of this is worth it.  The port is not working for me, flat out.  Is it working for you?  If you go to /usr/ports/devel/cmake and type "make", does it build?  Note that you need to have the same version I have, which is revision 403079, dated  2015-12-05 16:16:19 -0500
